$comment: Schema version: 1.1.0 | Convention: hashfm-agent 1.x | Last updated: 2026-05-07
title: hashfm-agent Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the hashfm-agent implementation. Uses if/then to support incremental version upgrades without breaking existing configs.

version.description: Schema version for this block. Optional — allows tools to explicitly declare their schema level.

format.description: The output format for the generated index.

output.description: The path to write the generated index to. If empty, writes to stdout.

recursive.description: Whether to scan subdirectories for hashfm-agent scripts.

include.description: List of glob patterns to include. Applied before exclude.

exclude.description: List of glob patterns to exclude.
